v1_yfinance_ranker.description: Original 2-year yfinance model. 54 features. Spearman rho ~0.032.

v2_feature_fix.description: V2: Fixed Dist_52W_High, lag features, Nifty50 regime, VWAP. 81 features.

v3_sector_momentum.description: V3: Sector momentum, Bar_Position, raw indicators, VP divergence, VWAP (fixed). 95 features.
v3_sector_momentum.notes: Final v3.1 with fixed VWAP and sector momentum. Targets achieved.

v4_regime_aware.description: V4 Regime-Aware + Multi-TF model. Optimized for stable alpha.
v4_regime_aware.notes: Regime-conditioned ranker. No scaler â€” XGBoost trees are scale-invariant.

v6_feature_fixed.description: V6 with fixed CCI (MAD), Vortex (True Range w gaps), Ultimate Oscillator.
v6_feature_fixed.notes: Retrained on 60d hourly upstox parquet files with today's (May 25) data included.

v7_yfinance_2y.description: V7: Trained on 2 years of hourly yfinance data with V6 (legacy=False) feature equations.
v7_yfinance_2y.notes: Trained on 2y hourly yfinance data. Verified fixed feature math (legacy=False).

v8_upstox_3y.description: V8: Trained on 3 years of hourly Upstox data with microstructure features (IBS, Buy_Pressure, etc.).
v8_upstox_3y.notes: Added microstructure features (IBS, Buy_Pressure, Return_Accel, Lower_Shadow, etc.). Huge performance boost.

v1_15min.description: V1_15min: Standalone 15-minute XGBoost ranking model. 95 features.
v1_15min.notes: Trained on 1y of 15-min Upstox data. Long P@3=58.9%, Short P@3=57.4%.

v1_30min.description: V1_30min: Standalone 30-minute XGBoost ranking model. 95 features.
v1_30min.notes: Trained on 1y of 30-min resampled Upstox data. Long P@3=57.1%, Short P@3=54.9%.

v2_15min_3y.description: V2_15min: Standalone 15-minute XGBoost ranking model on 3 years of data. 86 features.
v2_15min_3y.notes: Trained on 3y of 15-min Upstox data (native 1m resampled). Long P@3=58.0%, Short P@3=57.0%.

v3_15min_clean.description: V3_15min CLEAN: 15-min ranker on rebuilt aligned data (1-min source, IST 09:15-anchored, session-masked forward returns). 86 features.
v3_15min_clean.notes: Rebuilt from data/ranking_data_upstox_15min_3y_clean.csv. No overnight leak. WF L-WR@3=58.0%, S-WR@3=57.2%. Ranking quality matches v2 (15m grid was always clean). SERVE-CONSISTENT with live (15m bins immune to UTC/IST offset).

v9_clean_1h.description: V9 CLEAN 1h: 1-hour ranker on rebuilt aligned data (1-min source, IST 09:15-anchored, session-masked, 5 intraday signals/day). 86 features.
v9_clean_1h.notes: Rebuilt from data/ranking_data_upstox_1h_3y_clean.csv. WF L-WR@3=52.8%, S-WR@3=52.0%. Rho ~half of v8 (overnight contamination removed). NOT production-deployable until live broker 1h resample is unified to match (currently 30min->1h IST :00 grid != this 09:15-anchored grid). RESEARCH/backtest only.

v10_native_1h.description: V10 NATIVE 1h: trained on Upstox V3 native hourly candles (HistoryV3Api hours/1). 86 features. Production-faithful â€” no resampling.
v10_native_1h.notes: Native Upstox V3 hourly candles (09:15-anchored, 5 intraday signals/day, session-masked). 928k rows, 54 months (2022-2026). WF L-WR@3=52.4%, S-WR@3=53.6%. IC ~28% > 15min->1h resample (v9) but ~half of 15m model. IC decaying over time (2026 fold Long Rho 0.012). PRODUCTION-CORRECT 1h: live inference can fetch identical V3 candles for zero train/serve skew. Collector: scripts/collectors/collect_upstox_1h_v3.py. Data: data/ranking_data_upstox_1h_v3_3y.csv.

daily_macro_v2.description: Daily Macro Gatekeeper V2: Trained on 10 years of daily data with macro, breadth, and global features.
daily_macro_v2.notes: Criteria v2 certified. Long: TRIGGER_GRADE, Short: FILTER_GRADE.

daily_macro_v3.description: Daily Macro Gatekeeper V3: Trained on 10 years of daily data with 1-day forward return target (Label_1D).
daily_macro_v3.notes: Certified under Gauntlet v2. Long: DEAD, Short: FILTER_GRADE.

v20_rolling_1h.description: V20 rolling-1h ranker (overlapping trailing-1h, 15-min step). Fresh 1h signal every 15-min scan. Gauntlet FILTER_GRADE both sides.
v20_rolling_1h.notes: REQUIRES config.ROLLING_1H_CANDLES=True. Rollback: set that False + switch active_model to v10_native_1h.
